sdk: @nehloo/graphnosis — the six headline/ablation runs produced at commit a27c400 (v0.7.1); the two naïve-top-k arms re-run under the post-v0.7.3 seed-sharing ablation hook (seedsOnly), which leaves the graph-arm retrieval path unchanged (Jun 2026). TF-IDF and naïve-top-k retrieval paths are unchanged through the published v0.7.2 (48785ba), a27c400's direct descendant
note: Sanitized: dataset question/gold text removed; question_id keys to the public dataset. Our predictions + judge verdicts retained.
flag_semantics: run.ts parses a flag with no following value as the string 'true' (e.g. bare '--enable-router' enables it). Do NOT write '--enable-router=true' — the parser does not split on '=', so that form leaves the flag unset (false). Defaults that matter: --answer-model defaults to gpt-4o-mini, --retrieval to tfidf, --judge to gpt-4o, --max-nodes to 30; --enable-router / --enable-session-summaries / --enable-preference-extraction all default false. '--ollama' points the answer model at http://localhost:11434/v1. '--label-run' only renames the output folder and does not affect the score.
verify: From benchmarks/evidence/: `shasum -a 256 -c checksums.txt` confirms file integrity; `grep -c '"correct":true' <file>` reproduces each numerator against the 500 public question_ids.

runs.description: 78.00% — §12.2/12.3 cloud-paired headline (results 30): hybrid retrieval (cloud embeddings) + GPT-4o answers + gpt-4o-mini session summaries & preference extraction.
64.60% — §12.2 zero-embedding-API (table0-tfidf-full): the 78.00% config with cloud embeddings removed (hybrid → tfidf). Isolates the embedding contribution at +11.8 points.
runs.command_provenance: confirmed — author-attested; the run's machine-generated folder-name label records router+summaries+prefs

runs.description: 62.20% — §12.2/12.4 TF-IDF graph + GPT-4o, enrichment off (ablation-gpt4o-noenrich): the 64.60% config minus session summaries & preference extraction (the +2.4-point enrichment delta). This is the graph arm of the §12.4 retrieval ablation.
runs.command_provenance: confirmed — author-attested; TF-IDF + gpt-4o + router, enrichment off

runs.description: 41.60% — §12.2 fully on-device (offline-full): the 62.20% config with the answer model swapped GPT-4o → Llama 3.2 3B via Ollama (the +20.6-point answer-model delta). Zero cloud. 8 questions errored (Ollama generation failures), counted as incorrect.
runs.command_provenance: confirmed — author-attested; 62.20% config with the answer model swapped to llama3.2:3b on Ollama

runs.description: 35.80% — on-device retrieval-ablation FLAT arm: Llama 3.2 3B via Ollama + naïve top-k, router on, no graph traversal. Re-run under the seed-sharing ablation hook so it draws the IDENTICAL seed pool as the 41.60% graph arm (TF-IDF + router, same model); the only remaining difference is the graph structure. The dual-graph substrate is worth +5.8 points for a 3B local model — the on-device mirror of the +13.2 gpt-4o graph-vs-flat delta. The paired 41.60% arm counted 8 Ollama errors as incorrect, so +5.8 is a conservative floor.
runs.command_provenance: exact — recorded verbatim in the run's results.md (results 35). Produced under the post-v0.7.3 seed-sharing ablation hook (seedsOnly), which leaves the graph-arm retrieval path unchanged.

runs.description: 49.00% — §12.4 ablation (results 34): naïve top-k retrieval, GPT-4o, router on, no graph traversal. Re-run under the seed-sharing ablation hook so it draws the IDENTICAL seed pool as the 62.20% graph arm; the only remaining difference is the graph structure, worth +13.2 points (of which +6.0 is the hub-independent scoring rule, vs the 56.20% additive arm).
runs.command_provenance: exact — recorded verbatim in the run's results.md (results 34). Produced under the post-v0.7.3 seed-sharing ablation hook (seedsOnly), which leaves the graph-arm retrieval path unchanged.

runs.description: 22.60% — §12.4 ablation (results 29): full history concatenated, GPT-4o, no retrieval. 9 questions overflowed the context window and failed outright.

runs.command: GNOSIS_SCORE_RULE=additive pnpm tsx tests/longmemeval/official/run.ts --answer-model gpt-4o --retrieval tfidf --enable-router --label-run
runs.description: 56.20% — Theorem 3 scoring-rule ablation: the 62.20% graph config with the traversal's max-score-wins rule replaced by additive (spreading-activation / PPR-style) accumulation via GNOSIS_SCORE_RULE=additive. Decomposes the §12.4 +17.4 graph advantage into structure (56.20 − 44.80 = +11.4) and the max-wins scoring rule (62.20 − 56.20 = +6.0, Theorem 3). 0 errors.
runs.command_provenance: the run's results.md records argv but NOT the GNOSIS_SCORE_RULE env var (a harness gap, now fixed for future runs); this arm is identified by its distinct 56.20% score vs the 62.20% max-wins arm that shares the same argv. Reproducible once the gated additive branch in src/core/query/traverser.ts is committed: set GNOSIS_SCORE_RULE=additive and run the command above.
